# 'MiOS' v0.2.4 -- AI Ingestion Index

'MiOS' is an immutable bootc-native Fedora workstation OS (base:
`ghcr.io/ublue-os/ucore-hci:stable-nvidia`) delivered as an OCI image.
The `mios.git` repo root is the system root `/`. No separate workspace.

## Day-0 agent entry points
- [usr/share/mios/ai/system.md](./usr/share/mios/ai/system.md): canonical agent system prompt (Day-0 contract; v0.2.4)
- [system-prompt.md](./system-prompt.md): repo-root pointer to the canonical prompt above (loaded by all agent CLIs)
- [usr/share/mios/ai/INDEX.md](./usr/share/mios/ai/INDEX.md): Architectural Laws + system interface
- [AGREEMENTS.md](./AGREEMENTS.md): runtime agreements + research-project framing

## Single source of truth
- [VERSION](./VERSION): canonical version stamp (mirrored to `/usr/share/mios/VERSION` at overlay time)
- [usr/share/mios/mios.toml](./usr/share/mios/mios.toml): vendor defaults for every operator-tunable option
- [usr/share/mios/configurator/index.html](./usr/share/mios/configurator/index.html): WYSIWYG editor for `mios.toml` (the user-facing surface)
- [automation/lib/globals.sh](./automation/lib/globals.sh) and [automation/lib/globals.ps1](./automation/lib/globals.ps1): single registry for VERSION + USERS + IMAGES + PORTS + URLS + REPOS + PATHS + FILES + UNITS + CONTAINERS + COLORS
- [tools/lib/userenv.sh](./tools/lib/userenv.sh): three-layer (vendor < host < user) `mios.toml` resolver -> `MIOS_*` env exports

## Pipeline (canonical 11-phase orchestrator)
- [mios-pipeline.sh](./mios-pipeline.sh) and [mios-pipeline.ps1](./mios-pipeline.ps1): Questions → Stage → MiOS-DEV → Overlay → Account → Install → Smoketest → Build → Deploy → Boot → Repeat
- [Containerfile](./Containerfile): OCI image definition (LABEL version parameterized via `ARG MIOS_VERSION`)
- [automation/](./automation/): numbered phase scripts + `lib/{common,packages,masking,paths,globals,agreements-banner}.{sh,ps1}`
- [usr/share/doc/mios/reference/PACKAGES.md](./usr/share/doc/mios/reference/PACKAGES.md): documentation-only catalog (the SSOT is `mios.toml [packages.<section>].pkgs` resolved by `automation/lib/packages.sh`)

## AI interface (OpenAI-compatible)
- [usr/share/mios/ai/v1/models.json](./usr/share/mios/ai/v1/models.json): OpenAI `/v1/models` catalog (chat + embedding)
- [usr/share/mios/ai/v1/mcp.json](./usr/share/mios/ai/v1/mcp.json): MCP server registry (mios-fs, mios-kb, mios-forge)
- [usr/lib/mios/tools/chat-completions-api/](./usr/lib/mios/tools/chat-completions-api/): chat-completions function definitions
- [usr/lib/mios/tools/responses-api/](./usr/lib/mios/tools/responses-api/): Responses API tool definitions
- [usr/lib/mios/schemas/](./usr/lib/mios/schemas/): JSON-schema outputs for structured responses

## Operational standards
- **AI Endpoint**: OpenAI-compatible REST at `http://localhost:8080/v1` (LocalAI / `mios-ai.container`); falls through to `http://localhost:11434` (Ollama) when `[ai].endpoint` is repointed
- **Architectural Laws**: USR-OVER-ETC, NO /VAR WRITES AT BUILD, GIT-MANAGED ROOT, VM|CONTAINER|FLATPAK ONLY, UNIFIED AI REDIRECTS
- **Infrastructure**: bootc, Podman Quadlets (5.6+ .build/.image/.container), composefs, greenboot, distrobox (mios-aichat container, `mios-ai` entrypoint)
- **User accounts**: provisioned at OVERLAY TIME via `/usr/lib/sysusers.d/*.conf` + `automation/31-user.sh` + `/usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/mios-user.conf`. Never patched at firstboot.
- **Operator entrypoints**:
  - Linux/WSL: `curl -fsSL .../bootstrap.sh | bash` → invokes `./mios-pipeline.sh` for the 11-phase chain
  - Windows: `irm .../install.ps1 | iex` → invokes `./mios-pipeline.ps1` for the 11-phase chain
  - Already on a deployed host: `./mios-pipeline.sh -p 6` (or `-Phase 6`) to re-run a single phase
